payload.title: Editor ergonomics — make in-editor diagnostics discoverable/packaged
payload.description: Reviewer wants 'rust-analyzer/LSP diagnostics so findings show in-editor.' trust-lsp exists as an MVP (diagnostics, hover, go-to-def; crates/trust-lsp) and a VS Code extension lives in editors/vscode, but it isn't a drop-in for someone adopting the advisory-linter path. Make the LSP/editor path discoverable and easy to point at an existing cargo project (esp. running the safety-lint subset live), and document setup beyond the Neovim snippet.
